name: Jun & Jun
overview: A former idol starts fresh as a cosmetics intern, only to face his flirty, tormenting boss—an old acquaintance. Tension rises, and sparks begin to fly.

trailers.title: Jun & Jun | Official Trailer 2 | Let's just say the suit and tie fantasy is all real! 😍
Jun & Jun | Official Trailer 1 | A Korean office rom-com about lost-and-found first love.
